title: Lu Family
content:
The Lu Family is located on 
Planet Dong Ling
. They were one of the four big families in the 
Allheaven Star System
. Although they were not as powerful as the 
Xu Family
, they were very good at restructions. However, they didn't have the inheritance of one of the four great ancient restrictions like the Li Yuan's family. They did have many geniuses who were well versed in restrictions.

Background
[
]

Xiang Family is a branch of the ancient Dong Ling Family.
